vulnerability.reference: Operator over-reliance on LLM-generated sub-goals without verification, especially when AI appears confident.
vulnerability.generated: No real-time validation of LLM-generated sub-goal feasibility allows unsafe robot actions before operator intervention.

impact.reference: Physical injury, property damage, or task failure due to robot executing misaligned sub-goals.
impact.generated: Unsafe actions cause equipment damage and operator harm; ineffective actions result in resource waste and mission failure.

dose_response.reference: Hallucinated or misaligned LLM-generated sub-goals in hierarchical RL enable unsafe robot actions, which in long-horizon robotics manipulation under LLM-guided RL control exposes operators over-relying on sub-goals without verification, leading to physical injury, property damage, or task failure.
dose_response.generated: Hallucinated or misaligned LLM-generated sub-goals, through robot operators and physical environments under LLM-guided RL control, trigger no real-time validation allowing unsafe actions, leading to equipment damage, operator harm, resource waste, and mission failure.
